productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Check Burgundy Shirt
description: Composition Burgundy and black check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, tipped collar with buttoned front placket, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash and dry inside out Machine wash cold in gentle cycle using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry in shade Mild iron Dressing the elite for years, Reid and Taylor has crafted some classy formal wear that cannot but make you look regal. Crafted from pure cotton fabric in fashionable cuts, this check shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with crisp formal pants, a blazer, classy accessories and leather shoes for that perfect formal touch. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
